enabled.description: Enable OTLP trace export for OpenTelemetry request spans.

endpoint.description: Explicit OTLP/HTTP traces endpoint. When omitted, standard OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_* environment variables and defaults apply.

headers.description: Optional OTLP exporter headers, for example authorization headers.

timeoutMs.description: Maximum OTLP trace export timeout per batch in milliseconds.

serviceName.description: OpenTelemetry resource service.name used for exported records.

captureMessageContent.description: Include gen_ai.input.messages and gen_ai.output.messages. Disabled by default because these fields can contain sensitive prompt or response content.

captureToolContent.description: Include GenAI tool definitions and tool call payload details. Disabled by default because these fields can contain sensitive data and can be large.
